query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A crowd of people gathers outside a building entrance at night, with some individuals passing through a doorway illuminated by purple neon light inside. Men and women in casual summer clothing stand and walk on the sidewalk near a brick wall adorned with hanging flower baskets. A uniformed security officer stands by the red door, while additional people are visible further inside the entrance. Trees and wooden architectural elements frame the upper right corner of the urban nightlife scene.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A crowd of people gathers outside a building entrance at night, with several moving figures rendered in pronounced motion blur from a slow shutter speed. Some individuals pass through a doorway illuminated by purple neon light, while a uniformed security officer stands by the red door. Men and women in casual summer clothing stand and walk on the sidewalk near a brick wall with hanging flower baskets, and additional people are visible deeper inside the entrance. The motion blur on select subjects creates a dynamic sense of movement against the sharper stationary elements in the urban nightlife scene.
